LSE-MS7-L3-1400P-MSSCI7-PZQ-AAD-01 • MS Science Grade 7 • Photosynthesis and the Cycling of Matter and Flow of Energy in Organisms • Puzzle Quest • African & African Diaspora Voices

The Garden Gate Code

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why are the girl and boy trying to figure out what the four plants do the same?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Analyze how the boy's observations bridge what he sees to the shared process the puzzle requires. What does the relationship between his evidence and the puzzle's condition reveal?
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NGSS MS-LS1-6  |  MS Science Grade 7: Photosynthesis and the Cycling of Matter and Flow of Energy in Organisms
